subject: WM-0065 review: changes_requested
body: High: TERMINAL_HARM still bypasses the ordered crisis chain after low-risk evidence; failCrisis only checks lowRiskEvidenceCount and can move TRACE directly to FAILED/HARM with escalationTick unset and escalationLevel 0. WM-0065 docs/spec define activated -> trace -> escalated -> resolved|failed, so irreversible harm should require ESCALATED state. Prior resolution-before-escalation and typed-array validation repairs are otherwise verified; required checks pass.
